properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Tenant Compliance Rollup (Platform Team)

**This view requires broad Reader access across the tenant** — it shows every subscription's non-compliance, not just your own. If a subscription looks like it's missing or shows zero findings, check your own access to it before assuming it's actually clean; Resource Graph only shows what your own identity can see, the same as the owner-facing Workbook, just at a wider scope here.

This is intentionally a **separate Workbook** from the owner-facing one, not an extra tab on it — most subscription owners don't have (and shouldn't need) the access this page requires, and bolting it onto their Workbook would just show them a confusing, empty tab."},"name":"text - heading"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"PolicyResources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| extend ResourceIdStr = tostring(properties.resourceId), SubscriptionId = tostring(properties.subscriptionId)
| summarize TotalNonCompliantResources = dcount(ResourceIdStr), SubscriptionsAffected = dcount(SubscriptionId)","size":1,"queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/tenants","crossComponentResources":["value::tenant"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"rowLimit":1,"filter":false}},"name":"query - tenant summary"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Non-Compliant Resources by Subscription"},"name":"text - grid heading"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"PolicyResources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| extend SubscriptionId = tostring(properties.subscriptionId), ResourceIdStr = tostring(properties.resourceId)
| summarize NonCompliantResources = dcount(ResourceIdStr) by SubscriptionId
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project SubscriptionId = subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
  ) on SubscriptionId
| project SubscriptionName, NonCompliantResources
| order by NonCompliantResources desc","size":1,"queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/tenants","crossComponentResources":["value::tenant"],"visualization":"categoricalbar"},"name":"query - by subscription bar"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"PolicyResources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| extend SubscriptionId = tostring(properties.subscriptionId),
         Effect = tolower(tostring(properties.policyDefinitionAction)),
         ResourceIdStr = tostring(properties.resourceId)
| extend Urgency = case(
    Effect in ('deny', 'deployifnotexists', 'modify'), 'Critical',
    Effect in ('auditifnotexists', 'audit'), 'Warning',
    'Informational')
| summarize NonCompliantResources = dcount(ResourceIdStr),
            Critical = dcountif(ResourceIdStr, Urgency == 'Critical'),
            Warning = dcountif(ResourceIdStr, Urgency == 'Warning')
  by SubscriptionId
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project SubscriptionId = subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
  ) on SubscriptionId
| project SubscriptionName, SubscriptionId, NonCompliantResources, Critical, Warning
| order by NonCompliantResources desc
","size":3,"queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/tenants","crossComponentResources":["value::tenant"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"rowLimit":10000,"filter":true}},"name":"query - by subscription grid"}],"isLocked":false,"fallbackResourceIds":["Azure Monitor"]}
